common.join_newsletter_desc: No spam — just launch news, previews, and early access opportunities for FirstSpawn.com.

login.title: WELCOME TO FIRSTSPAWN
login.subtitle: Log in to access your favorite servers and communities.

register.title: START YOUR JOURNEY
register.subtitle: Join the verified ecosystem for Minecraft and Hytale.
register.marketingConsentLabel: I want to receive product updates and marketing emails from FirstSpawn.
register.legalDisclaimer: By joining, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. We never post to connected accounts without permission.

activation.title: CHECK YOUR INBOX
activation.message: You will soon receive an email on the following address:
activation.instruction: Please activate your account by clicking on the link provided in it.
activation.spam_warning: Please remember to check your spam and trash box!!!
activation.provider_warning: Services like Hotmail, Yahoo, AOL often mistakenly identify the activation email as spam!

cta.title: Ready to find your
cta.subtitle: Stop wasting time on pay-to-win billboards. Discover communities backed by verified uptime and real player retention.

brand.name: FIRSTSPAWN
brand.description: The infrastructure for reliable voxel multiplayer discovery. We prioritize performance data over paid placements.

bottom.copyright: © {year} FirstSpawn. Not affiliated with Hypixel Studios or Mojang.

cookie_consent.title: COOKIE SETTINGS
cookie_consent.introPrefix: Our website uses essential cookies and limited technical data to keep FirstSpawn secure, maintain your session, remember language preferences, and protect core platform functionality.
cookie_consent.introSuffix: about how these settings affect your experience.
cookie_consent.consentPrefix: With your permission, FirstSpawn may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform, improve discovery flows, and make ranking, trust, and onboarding systems more reliable. See our
cookie_consent.consentSuffix: for more detail. Analytics providers may act as
cookie_consent.essentialDescription: Required for account security, session continuity, language settings, and the basic operation of the platform. These remain enabled.
cookie_consent.analyticsDescription: Helps us measure traffic, understand feature usage, and improve product decisions without turning discovery into paid placement.
cookie_consent.manageDescription: With your permission, FirstSpawn may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform and to improve discovery, trust, and onboarding systems. Essential cookies remain enabled because they support the secure and reliable operation of the site.
cookie_consent.categoryUnavailable: Personalization and marketing cookies are not currently active on FirstSpawn.

landing.scene_alt: A dusk overworld vista with a spawn overlook, beacon tower, ruined portal arch, scanning signal trails, and the FirstSpawn scout familiar surveying the route ahead.
landing.hero_subtitle: The first verified discovery platform for Minecraft and Hytale servers. Real players. Real uptime. Real communities.
landing.features_subtitle: Built differently for the voxel gaming community
landing.feature_1_desc: No more fake online counts. Our bots verify every server's status in real-time.
landing.feature_2_desc: Reviews backed by actual playtime. Only real players can leave ratings.
landing.feature_3_desc: One identity across Minecraft, Hytale, and beyond. Sync your journey.
landing.feature_4_desc: Form alliances, compete on leaderboards, and unlock exclusive rewards.
landing.step_1_desc: Browse verified servers with real player reviews and live uptime data.
landing.step_2_desc: Join with one click. Your profile syncs across all supported games.
landing.step_3_desc: Leave reviews, earn badges, and climb the reputation ladder.
landing.cta_section_subtitle: Join thousands of players finding their forever servers.
landing.notify_desc: Join thousands of players waiting for launch. Early subscribers get exclusive access & founding member perks!
landing.discovery_demo_prompt: Find me a verified survival server with a strong community and steady activity.
landing.discovery_demo_response: Scanning verified signals. I found one strong match for players who want reliable uptime, an active chat loop, and room to grow.
landing.discovery_demo_card_description: Survival world with a stable economy, active moderators, and a social player base that stays busy after peak hours.
landing.discovery_composer_placeholder: Ask FirstSpawn to find your next world...
landing.discovery_pending: Live discovery replies are coming soon. Your query is ready for the real chat flow.
